nodes.name: Wren Calder
nodes.body: Sees phantom ships she believes are warnings she can't decode yet.

nodes.name: Isaac Calder
nodes.body: Returns with news that threatens Wren's chosen exile.

nodes.name: The Harbormaster
nodes.body: Knows something he hasn't said in thirty years.

nodes.title: Setting
nodes.body: North Atlantic cliffs, 1953. One road in, mostly flooded in winter. A lighthouse called Third Light.

nodes.title: Rule of the world
nodes.body: The phantom ships are visible only to Wren — never on the horizon, always in the middle distance.

nodes.title: Tone
nodes.body: Gothic, patient, a little unkind. Sentences that hold their breath.

nodes.title: A storm. The first ship.
nodes.body: Wren sees something impossible during the Tuesday watch.

nodes.title: Isaac arrives.
nodes.body: News from the mainland Wren has been postponing.

nodes.title: She reads the pattern.
nodes.body: The ships aren't random. They make a name.

nodes.title: A choice on the stairs.
nodes.body: To descend. To stay. To light the lamp a different way.
